what_it_does: Tells Git to ignore any file in this directory whose name ends with .rows.ndjson.
observations: Targets an NDJSON-formatted, row-oriented file variant
Located in the scans subdirectory of channel-memory
No comments, negations, or directory-specific rules
standouts: Ignores generated or bulk .rows.ndjson scan data files
conventions: No trailing slash or directory scoping
notes: This file keeps row-oriented NDJSON scan artifacts out of version control.
questions: Are these artifacts meant to be transient or cached?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file's purpose is to ignore files, and it ignores the .rows.ndjson pattern.
intention_signals: Avoid committing large or regenerated per-row NDJSON scan outputs.
contribution: Records the policy that .rows.ndjson artifacts inside channel-memory/scans are not source-controlled.
summary_for_embedding: A .gitignore file in company/channel-memory/scans that excludes files matching *.rows.ndjson from version control.
intention_for_embedding: To prevent generated row-oriented NDJSON scan artifacts from being committed to the repository.
